title: Implement interfaces and implements checks
goal: Add interface declarations and `implements` checking for class public APIs.
context: A class may implement multiple interfaces.
Every class also defines an implicit interface for its public API.
steps: Add parser/AST support for `interface` declarations and `class X implements A, B`.
Add checker support for interface member uniqueness and implemented method presence/arity.
Support classes implementing explicit interfaces and the implicit interface of another class.
Add tests for valid implementations, missing methods, wrong arity, duplicate interface methods, and no implementation inheritance.
done_when: Implicit class interface checks work for the supported subset.
